scores.correctness_notes: Response is largely correct and adds many valid extras (user/group, kill-delay, multiple checks, support service). However, it omits two key elements the gold standard flags: (1) `override` field on services (noted as required), and (2) `on-check-failure` in the service to link check failures to actions like restart.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields used (after, requires, kill-delay, user, group, summary, description at service level, custom headers in HTTP check) are valid Pebble layer spec fields
